description.p: PaneFlow is a GPU-accelerated terminal multiplexer for Linux. It splits your terminal into panes and workspaces rendered natively with Vulkan via Zed's GPUI framework — no host terminal emulator required.

ul.li: Horizontal and vertical split panes with drag-to-resize, up to 32 panes
Up to 20 workspaces with rename and quick-switch shortcuts
Session persistence — layouts, working directories, and workspace names restored on relaunch
Hot-reloading themes (Catppuccin Mocha, One Dark, Dracula, Gruvbox Dark, Solarized Dark)
Unix socket JSON-RPC 2.0 IPC for scripting and AI agent integration
Sidebar: empty state, clear-all, drag-and-drop reorder
Tabs: double-click the tab bar to open a new terminal
